name: Pasta w/ Goat Cheese & Asparagus - Gwhp32a
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and trim the asparagus spears. Cut them diagonally into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the fettuccine and cook until al dente, about 9-12 minutes. Reserve 1/4 cup of pasta cooking water before draining the pasta.
3. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat. Add the asparagus and sauté for 1 minute. Stir in the drained fettuccine, goat cheese, chives, and pepper. Pour in reserved pasta water to taste, tossing well. Serve.
